channel.title: Starbucks Copycat on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Starbucks Copycat on Barista At Home

item.title: Iced Caramel Macchiato Recipe (Starbucks Copycat) — The Layered Original
item.description: How to make an iced caramel macchiato at home: vanilla syrup + cold milk + espresso poured last + caramel drizzle on top. Layered like Starbucks, exact ratios for Tall/Grande/Venti.

item.title: Iced Flat White Recipe: Ristretto Shots, Cold Whole Milk, No Foam
item.description: How to make a Starbucks-style iced flat white at home in 4 minutes — 2 ristretto shots over cold whole milk and ice. Stronger and creamier than an iced latte.

item.title: Iced Shaken Espresso (Starbucks Copycat Recipe)
item.description: Make a Starbucks Iced Shaken Espresso at home: 2 espresso shots, simple syrup, and ice — shaken hard for 20 seconds, topped with milk. Tall, Grande, and Venti ratios + 6 variations.

item.title: Olive Oil Coffee (Oleato): What It Is, How to Make It at Home
item.description: Olive oil coffee — popularized by Starbucks Oleato — is espresso (or coffee) blended with extra virgin olive oil. Learn the science, the Starbucks copycat ratios, and how to make it at home with hot and iced variations.

item.title: Chai Latte Recipe: How to Make It at Home (3 Ways + Dirty Chai)
item.description: Make a better chai latte at home than anything Starbucks serves. Three methods: from-scratch spice blend, concentrate shortcut, and tea bag. Includes dirty chai with espresso.

item.title: London Fog Latte Recipe (Hot & Iced) — Earl Grey Tea Latte
item.description: Make a London Fog Latte at home — the creamy Earl Grey tea latte with vanilla and steamed milk. Includes Starbucks copycat ratios and an iced version.

item.title: Strawberry Matcha Latte Recipe (Iced & Dirty Version)
item.description: Make the viral strawberry matcha latte at home — layered fresh strawberry puree, creamy milk, and earthy matcha. Includes a dirty espresso version and tips for perfect layers.

item.title: Eggnog Latte Recipe (Hot + Iced, Starbucks Copycat)
item.description: Make a rich, creamy eggnog latte at home — better than the Starbucks version they discontinued. Hot, iced, and dairy-free variations with homemade eggnog option.

item.title: Java Chip Frappuccino Recipe: Starbucks Copycat (It's Been Discontinued)
item.description: The Java Chip Frappuccino was removed from the US Starbucks menu — but you can make it at home in 5 minutes. Espresso, mocha sauce, mini chocolate chips, blended smooth.

item.title: Matcha Frappuccino Recipe: Green Tea Frappuccino (With or Without Espresso)
item.description: Make a Starbucks Matcha Crème Frappuccino at home — or try the 'dirty matcha' version with espresso. Includes matcha grade guide, dairy-free swaps, and answers to all the health questions.

item.title: Mocha Frappuccino Recipe: Starbucks Copycat With Real Espresso
item.description: Make a Starbucks Mocha Frappuccino at home in 5 minutes — espresso, homemade mocha sauce, milk, and ice blended thick. Includes Grande and Venti sizing, dairy-free swaps, and 5 variations.

item.title: Caramel Frappuccino Recipe: How to Make Starbucks Copycat at Home
item.description: Make a caramel frappuccino at home in 5 minutes — espresso, caramel sauce, milk, and ice blended to perfection. Includes hot, iced, and frozen versions, plus dairy-free swaps.

item.title: Pumpkin Cream Cold Brew Recipe: Starbucks Copycat You Can Make at Home
item.description: Make Starbucks pumpkin cream cold brew at home — cold brew topped with pumpkin cream cold foam. Includes the pumpkin spice syrup recipe, dairy-free version, and year-round tips.

item.title: Cinnamon Dolce Latte Recipe (Starbucks Copycat)
item.description: Make a cinnamon dolce latte at home with a simple homemade cinnamon dolce syrup — hot or iced, with Starbucks copycat ratios included.

item.title: Lavender Latte Recipe (Hot & Iced)
item.description: Make a lavender latte at home with homemade lavender syrup — step-by-step instructions for hot and iced versions, plus Starbucks copycat ratios.

item.title: Caramel Latte Recipe (Hot & Iced) — Better Than Coffee Shop
item.description: Make a caramel latte at home with homemade caramel sauce, espresso, and steamed milk. Hot and iced versions, Starbucks copycat ratios, and tips for perfect caramel flavor.

item.title: Pistachio Latte Recipe (Hot & Iced) — Starbucks Copycat
item.description: Make a pistachio latte at home with homemade pistachio syrup, espresso, and steamed milk. Better than Starbucks, ready in 10 minutes.

item.title: White Chocolate Mocha Recipe (Starbucks Copycat — Hot & Iced)
item.description: Make a white chocolate mocha at home with homemade white chocolate sauce, espresso, and steamed milk. Better than Starbucks — and a fraction of the price.

item.title: Pumpkin Spice Latte Recipe (Better Than Starbucks)
item.description: Make a pumpkin spice latte at home with real pumpkin, espresso, and warm spices. Tastes better than Starbucks, costs $1.50, and takes 8 minutes.

item.title: Vanilla Sweet Cream Cold Brew (Starbucks Copycat Recipe)
item.description: Make the Starbucks Vanilla Sweet Cream Cold Brew at home in minutes. Cold brew + homemade vanilla sweet cream + vanilla syrup. Tastes identical, costs 1/5 the price.

item.title: Brown Sugar Shaken Espresso Recipe (Starbucks Copycat)
item.description: Make the viral brown sugar shaken espresso at home in 5 minutes. Espresso + brown sugar syrup + cinnamon shaken over ice and topped with oat milk. Better than Starbucks.
